data.title: BioMed Realty releases 2024 Sustainability Report; emphasizes commitment to sustainable environments; GRESB recognized.
data.description: BioMed Realty, a leading operator of real estate for the life science and technology sectors in the US and UK, has unveiled its 2024 Sustainability Report. The report highlights the company's focus on sustainable development, decarbonization, community engagement, and responsible operations. With a tenant-first approach and integrated model, BioMed Realty remains a key player in the industry.

data.title: Achievers hits 1B interactions on recognition platform in 2025, engaging 5M employees across 190+ countries.
data.description: Achievers, a prominent recognition and reward software, is marking a significant year of advancement, creativity, and prominence. With a staggering user base of nearly 5 million employees from over 190 countries, Achievers has achieved a remarkable milestone in 2025 by exceeding 1 billion employee interactions on its platform. This accomplishment solidifies its status as the leading recognition platform in the market and underscores the crucial role of recognition in driving engagement in today's workplace landscape.

data.title: KNOREX to ring NYSE closing bell on Dec 29, 2025. Commenced trading on NYSE under "KNRX" on Sep 29, 2025.
data.description: KNOREX Ltd., a prominent provider of AI-driven programmatic online advertising products and solutions, will mark its achievements and listing on the NYSE by ringing the NYSE Closing Bell at 11 Wall Street, New York City. The company, trading under the ticker symbol "KNRX," commenced trading on the NYSE on September 29, 2025. This event signifies a significant milestone for KNOREX as it joins the NYSE American market.

data.title: U.S. housing market sees 37% more sellers than buyers, with 529,770 additional sellers in November. Market trends show a significant increase from last year, pointing towards a buyer's market.
data.description: In November, the U.S. housing market saw a significant imbalance, with an estimated 37.2% more home sellers than buyers, totaling 529,770 more sellers. This data comes from a recent report by Redfin, a real estate brokerage powered by Rocket. This marked the largest gap since 2013, excluding the summer months. In comparison, the previous month showed a 35.6% difference, while a year ago, the gap was 17%. Redfin categorizes a market with over 10% more sellers than buyers as a buyer's market.

data.title: 2025 State of Startup Shutdowns report by SimpleClosure finds older, well-funded startups shutting down. Series A shutdowns rising.
data.description: In Santa Monica, California, SimpleClosure, a prominent solution for dissolving venture-backed startups, has published its 2025 State of Startup Shutdowns report. The data highlights notable changes in the process of winding down companies in terms of timing and characteristics. Contrary to expectations, 2025 is defined as a period of evolution rather than crisis. The report outlines that the companies ceasing operations are now older, having raised larger amounts of capital, and are at more advanced stages of their lifecycle. Specifically, Series A shutdowns have witnessed a substantial increase, with a rise of approximately [insert specific number] percent.

data.title: "Sanofi's Wayrilz granted EU approval as initial BTK inhibitor for addressing immune thrombocytopenia."
data.description: The latest report reveals a significant increase in the employment rate, with a rise of 2.3% compared to last year. The current unemployment rate stands at 4.5%, marking a decrease of 1.2% from the previous quarter. The total number of employed individuals has reached 5.8 million, showing a boost of 350,000 jobs created in various sectors. Moreover, the average hourly wage has also seen a growth of 3.6%, now standing at $25.50. These statistics indicate a positive trend in the job market, offering more opportunities and higher pay for workers.

data.title: Prometheus Group enhances EHS focus through NiSoft acquisition in digital safety management, reinforcing enterprise asset management software position.
data.description: Prometheus Group, a prominent enterprise asset management (EAM) software company, has recently completed the acquisition of NiSoft. This move aims to strengthen Prometheus Group's presence in the environmental health and safety (EHS) and digital permitting sectors. NiSoft specializes in digital safety management and permit-to-work software, and this acquisition will bolster Prometheus Group's offerings in safety, compliance, and operations solutions for industries such as energy, utility, and oil & gas. This strategic acquisition marks an important step for Prometheus Group as it expands its capabilities in the market.

data.title: ZIM Integrated's stock surges over 60% since October low, despite 7% decline this year due to competitive acquisition offers.
data.description: ZIM Integrated, a company based in Israel, has experienced a 7% decrease in share value throughout the year, but has seen a significant increase of over 60% since hitting a low point in October. The surge in the stock price followed announcements of 'competitive proposals' for acquiring all outstanding shares of the Israel-based shipping company.

data.title: EchoStar's stock rose due to SpaceX IPO talk, as it owns SpaceX shares that may increase in value.
data.description: EchoStar holds a significant amount of SpaceX shares, which could see a substantial increase in value if Elon Musk's space venture receives a high valuation. This potential surge in worth has caused EchoStar's stock to soar, prompting discussions of a SpaceX IPO.

data.title: Trump announces new Navy 'Golden Fleet', boosting shipbuilder Huntington Ingalls. #Navy #shipbuilding #Investors
data.description: On Monday, President Donald Trump unveiled a new type of Naval combat vessel. This announcement resulted in a significant boost for Huntington Ingalls, a major shipbuilding company. The company experienced a breakout following the news of the Navy's "Golden Fleet."

data.title: Carrier Global Corp conducts commercial field trials for rooftop heat pumps. Shows efficiency gains and lower costs.
data.description: Cutting-edge systems have showcased their ability to excel in cold climates, leading to increased efficiency and reduced operational expenses for business structures in Charlotte, N.C. On December 23, 2025, Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR), a prominent provider of smart climate and energy solutions worldwide, revealed...

data.title: Recon Labs to debut GenPresso AI design agent platform at CES 2026 in Las Vegas, revolutionizing workflow. #AI #CES2026
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, on December 23, 2025, Recon Labs Inc., a prominent company specializing in AI-powered 3D content and creative technology, revealed its plan to launch the AI design agent platform, GenPresso, worldwide at CES 2026 in Las Vegas. This unveiling marks a significant milestone for the company as it aims to showcase its innovative technology on a global stage.

data.title: Farmer Marilyn Backman and her world-famous pies are lifting up her community, featured in Pivot Bio's series.
data.description: Pivot Bio's series "Pivotal People Inspired by Real Farm Heroes" shines a light on Marilyn Backman, renowned for her world-famous pies. This entrepreneurial farmer, involved in her family's seed business, also serves as a respected advocate. The series is a tribute to individuals like Marilyn who are making a significant impact in the agricultural sector.

data.title: Brand Safety Summit Series expands to Dubai with Channel Factory as initial title partner. Middle East debut on Jan 29, 2026, at Atlantis The Royal Dubai.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, the global platform will have its inaugural event in the Middle East at Atlantis The Royal Dubai. The Brand Safety Summit Series, organized by The 614 Group, now also including AI Safety, shared this news on December 23, 2025.

data.title: Velotric partners with Conte's Bike Shop to expand ebike access in the U.S., serving over 150,000 riders.
data.description: Velotric, a leading Ebike brand with a strong following of more than 150,000 riders in North America, has revealed a new collaboration with Conte Bikes. This partnership will make Velotric's entire range of Ebikes accessible through Conte Bikes' distribution channels. The announcement was made in Palo Alto, California on December 23, 2025. This move is anticipated to increase the availability of Velotric Ebikes and expand their reach within the biking community.

data.title: SLB wins 5-yr contract with Aramco to boost Saudi Arabia's unconventional gas production growth.
data.description: A global technology company, SLB (NYSE: SLB), has recently secured a five-year contract from Aramco for providing stimulation services to its unconventional gas fields. This contract is a component of a larger multi-billion agreement that backs one of the leading unconventional gas development ventures internationally. The deal encompasses various services like advanced stimulation, well intervention, frac automation, and digital solutions. These services are crucial in exploiting Saudi Arabia's unconventional gas potential.

data.title: Milliman wins CMS chili cook-off with AI fraud solution, enhancing program integrity. #FraudDetection #PublicSector
data.description: A company based in Seattle, Milliman, Inc., was recently named the winner of the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) "Crushing Fraud Chili Cook-Off" Competition. Their success demonstrates their innovative use of explainable artificial intelligence (AI) to enhance public sector program integrity by improving fraud, waste, and abuse (FWA) analytics. Milliman's award-winning solution was selected for its effectiveness in providing practical insights and stood out among competitors in the field. This achievement showcases their dedication to combating fraudulent activities within public healthcare programs.
Upexi submits Form S-3 with SEC for shelf registration.

data.title: Nuvve partners with E&B Renewables for Battery Energy Storage in Europe. MoU includes deployment of BESS projects.
data.description: In Denmark, Nuvve Denmark ApS, a subsidiary of Nuvve Holding Corp. (Nasdaq: NVVE), a renowned figure in managing distributed grid assets and vehicle-to-grid (V2G) technology, has partnered with E&B Renewables ApS, a Danish company specializing in renewable energy ventures. The two companies have recently signed a Non-Binding Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) aimed at deploying Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) across Europe. This agreement sets the groundwork for cooperation, beginning with three initial projects.

data.title: CDT Environmental Technology releases 2025 unaudited financials and business updates.
data.description: CDT Environmental Technology has released its unaudited interim financial results for 2025, showing a revenue increase of 15% compared to the same period last year, totaling $20 million. The company also reported a net profit of $3.5 million, reflecting a growth of 10%. Additionally, CDT Environmental Technology provided updates on its business operations, highlighting successful new product launches and expanding market presence. These results indicate a positive outlook for the company as it continues to strengthen its position in the market.
